song.title: You Are My Hiding Place
song.lyrics: [V1] . Bm Em A You are my hiding place . Dsus D You always fill my heart . G Em F With songs of deliverance .Bm Whenever I am afraid I will trust in You .Em A I will trust in You .Dsus D G Em Let the weak say I am strong . F# In the strength of the Lord . Bm I will trust in You
